title: American Chicken Casserole
description: A classic American comfort food dish featuring chicken, pasta, and a creamy sauce.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions; set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté chopped onion until softened.
Add frozen peas and carrots and cook until thawed.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked pasta, chicken, soup, sour cream, salt, and pepper. Stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until cheese is golden brown.
Let casserole rest for a few minutes before serving.
